creator: thomas@goodking.ca
text:
Previous reply got munged, I concur with the patch, please commit.

----- Original Message ----- 
From: "Edwin Groothuis" <edwin@FreeBSD.ORG>
To: <thomas@goodking.ca>
Sent: Sunday, March 04, 2007 6:40 PM
Subject: Re: ports/109874: [PATCH] archivers/p5-Compress-Raw-Zlib: update to 
2.004


> Maintainer of archivers/p5-Compress-Raw-Zlib,
>
> Please note that PR ports/109874 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/109874
>
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
